two_column_columns.title: Context

faq_items.title: Why now?
faq_items.body: Because execution friction is already visible.

faq_items.title: What changes first?
faq_items.body: Start with one workflow and one owner.

slides.title: Summary
slides.body: The strongest decks keep the story narrow, the proof readable, and the action path explicit.

slides.title: Closing
slides.quote: A strong deck is a structured decision tool, not just a formatted document.
